productDisplayName: Gliders Men Blue Econew Flip Flops
description: Style Note These flip flops from gliders reference classic plaid on their footbed for vintage appeal. The print adds an interesting dimension to the classic flip-flop without going over the top. Product Details Blunt toed flip flop in blue and black with rubber thong style straps  Soft textured rubber footbed Single piece rubber outsole that has branched grooves Material and Care Synthetic, rubber Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
